flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Colorado Mountain College fell 81% between 2021 and 2024 (14.3% → 2.8%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Colorado Mountain College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.5k → $12.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Colorado Mountain College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Colorado Mountain College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (34.9% → 40.0%).
